rationale.ai-review: Verification manager independently evaluates milestone outcomes and rejects incomplete work.
rationale.remediation-gating: Autonomous fix loops governed by budget-decay retries and self-aware convergence stopping.
rationale.hitl-workflow: Asynchronous human oversight via issue filing consumed at natural phase boundaries.
rationale.framework: Contributes an open-source orchestration framework for continuous multi-agent development.
rationale.built-system: Implemented as a working system evaluated on real-world software projects.
rationale.agentic: Autonomous AI-planned multi-step work delivered by role-specialized agent teams.
rationale.steering: Strategy phase and dynamic worker generation are substantive generation contributions.
rationale.risk-quality: Evaluates on bug regressions, correctness, and pixel similarity quality metrics.
